rationale: Both candidates correctly identify PR #4527 as the regression (None inter-stage payload starving the downstream stage) and PR #4792 as the fix already folded into the 0.24 rebase commit a560ed18, matching the thread's actual resolution and quoting the exact ground-truth code snippet verbatim. X is more thorough (upgrade path, cherry-pick option, red-herring debunking, reopen criteria) but states many precise unhedged line-number citations that go well beyond the verifiable evidence, risking overconfidence; Y is more concise, appropriately hedges its line numbers with '~', and adds a concrete curl-based verification step, though it also invents an unverifiable test name. Net quality is essentially even.
